title: AMD vs Intel: Which Stock Will Lead in 2026?
text: 24/7 Wall St analysis compares AMD and Intel as semiconductor leaders for 2026. AMD is positioned to outperform Intel based on several factors: stronger near-term data center growth (60%+ expected), established customer relationships, and successful AI GPU launch. Intel faces larger transformation challenges despite potential upside from manufacturing improvements. AMD's earnings growth is expected to accelerate with EPYC ramping and MI450 launch. The analysis predicts AMD will deliver 88% earnings growth in 2026 and 71% in 2027 based on consensus estimates. Intel's growth, while potentially higher longer-term, faces more near-term execution risk. From a risk-return perspective, AMD offers better visibility and momentum. The stock price reflects strong growth expectations but remains justified by underlying fundamentals. For 2026 outperformance, AMD is the consensus pick among Wall Street analysts and strategists.
